_provenance.command: modal run scripts/modal_scale_and_connector.py --only persist  (--native-load default on)
_provenance.note: Re-run AFTER the bf16-end-to-end load-path fix (keep_native). load_ms collapses from ~25s to ~14ms at 64k (fp32 host widen removed; mmap lazy). Within-run resume now beats cold re-prefill 3.7-5.5x and stays bit-identical, flipping the 2026-07-09-a100-8b-persist.json result (0.6-0.7x loss). CAVEAT: this run's box was ~1.7x slower in absolute terms than the pre-fix run (noisy A100 allocation; cold prefill 13.6s->23.5s at 64k), so compare speedups WITHIN a run, not absolute times across runs.
